rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount has no relation to Educ. Code §13.103, which governs initiation of detachment of territory from existing school districts.
quote: Creation of a new district by detachment is initiated by resolution of the board of trustees of each district from which territory is to be detached or by a petition presented to the commissioners court.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and school district detachment procedures.
